# vtm_security (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ssh_intrusion_bantime` (Number)
- `ssh_intrusion_blacklist` (Set of String)
- `ssh_intrusion_enabled` (Boolean)
